prompt: Create a dynamic vertical anime illustration of a blue-eyed schoolgirl floating or falling through a surreal inverted city sky, seen from an extreme wide-angle perspective with the viewer below her outstretched hand. She has long black hair with electric blue and violet highlights, wind-tossed strands fanning dramatically upward, luminous cyan-blue eyes, a calm slightly wistful expression, and glossy painted fingernails as her hand reaches toward the camera in strong foreshortening. Dress her in a dark navy Japanese school uniform with a blue ribbon, pleated skirt, black thigh-high socks, and shiny rain-wet fabric. The environment is a dreamlike urban skyline warped around her, with skyscrapers, rails, cables, and reflective glass planes curving through the composition as if gravity has dissolved. Use a vivid neon cobalt blue, ultraviolet purple, hot magenta, cyan, and pink sunset light, high contrast rim lighting, liquid reflections, iridescent prism fragments, paint-like splashes, and glowing sky clouds. Include exactly 10 visible transparent soap-bubble orbs: 1 huge cropped bubble at the bottom left edge, 1 large bubble at the lower right, 1 medium bubble near her hair on the left, 1 small bubble on her chest, 1 tiny bubble near her reaching hand, 1 small bubble above her head, 1 medium bubble in the upper right corner, 1 small bubble at mid-right, and 2 tiny bubbles scattered in the upper sky. Add a bright starburst sun near the upper center, falling pink petals or liquid flecks, and crystalline reflective shards around the foreground. Style: highly detailed modern anime key visual, cinematic composition, ultra-saturated colors, glossy digital painting, sharp linework mixed with painterly lighting, emotional and fantastical atmosphere, no text, no border.
